title: elymus arenarius var. simulans
intro: Elymus arenarius var. simulans, also known as the coastal wheatgrass or sea couch, is a perennial grass species native to the coastal areas of Europe and North Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and even exhibit antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elymus arenarius var. simulans include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve overall cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
